title: Projectile Motion
description: Real-time simulation of trajectory dynamics with configurable air resistance and initial conditions.

title: Space-Time Visualizer
description: Visual model of gravitational lensing effects and the curvature of space-time around massive bodies.

title: Game Physics Engine
description: Collision detection system handling velocities, restitution, and force vectors for interactive environments.

title: Epidemic Model
description: SIR/SEIR compartmental model for simulating disease spread with adjustable transmission parameters.

title: Particle System
description: N-body collision engine with energy and momentum conservation principles across particle interactions.

title: Climate Model
description: Simplified coupled atmospheric model simulating temperature, CO₂ feedback, and long-term trends.
